Agentic SDLC Cockpit

Input → 7-stage lifecycle, driven by an agent fleet · gates labelled by real enforcement
mode: idle idle
The one story (frozen)
…
–
fixtures correct
–
negatives caught (anti-theater)
Tier-1 validates harness logic + artifact contracts with seeded fixtures — not live-agent quality. Human/native gates are informational here and enforced natively in Tier-2/3.
